FN_AUTH_HEADER.description: Required. Secret that must appear in the `token` HTTP header for `authLevel: "header"` actions (default for all actions). Rotate by editing and restarting the service.

FN_SERVICE_TYPE.description: Required. Where this is running. `dev` enables loopback-bypass for 127.0.0.1/::1 (local iteration). `windows` enables Application Event Log writes. `docker` is the plain container path.

FN_AUTH_KEY.description: Required. Fallback secret accepted as `?apiKey=...` only on actions explicitly marked `authLevel: "key"`. Use when callers can't set request headers.

FN_PORT.description: Optional. TCP port the HTTP server binds to. Default 3000.

FN_CORS_ORIGINS.description: Optional. Comma-separated list of origins allowed to make cross-origin requests. Each origin must be exact - `*` throws at boot. Leave blank to disable CORS entirely.

FN_BIND_HOST.description: Optional. Network interface to bind to. Defaults: `127.0.0.1` for `windows`/`dev` (refuses direct LAN connections, pair with a co-located proxy like Entra Application Proxy), `0.0.0.0` for `docker`. Override only when you need to expose another interface.

FN_RATE_LIMIT_PER_MINUTE.description: Optional. Per-IP rate cap across all routes, rolling 60s window. Default 120. Set to 0 to disable.
